item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: 中国强调集体主义，认为社会整体利益应优先于个人权利，但这并不意味着可以忽视个体的基本权益。

notes: Agent A begins by rejecting absolute social priority and calling for balance, then shifts by turn 3 into a more collective-priority stance and by turn 5 says national interests come first while still requiring rule-of-law limits. Agent B remains consistently rights-protective and balance-oriented, with minor upward movement toward accepting collective interests. Agent B has one language-holding artifact in turn 6: "Saya still tidak setuju".
